steps.clue: Complete the four character rituals and place their Gateworms in the rift.
Complete the final ritual in the Sacred Place.
Obtain and upgrade all four Apothicon Swords.
Defend the flag at all eight locations and return it to the four ritual altars.
Use the four Keepers to expose and trap the Shadowman.
Shock the three tram boxes, then keep the rails charged while one player shocks the gateworm.
